capital_after.description: Rs. 1,00,000 divided into 10,000 Equity Shares of Rs. 10 each

events.particulars: Initial Authorised Share Capital at the time of incorporation of the Company.

capital_before.description: Rs. 1,00,000 divided into 10,000 Equity Shares of Rs. 10 each

capital_after.description: Rs. 3,00,000 divided into 30,000 Equity Shares of Rs. 10 each

events.particulars: Increase in Authorised Share Capital from Rs. 1,00,000 to Rs. 3,00,000 by creation of additional 20,000 Equity Shares of Rs. 10 each.

capital_before.description: Rs. 3,00,000 divided into 30,000 Equity Shares of Rs. 10 each

capital_after.description: Rs. 10,00,000 divided into 50,000 Equity Shares of Rs. 10 each and 50,000 Preference Shares of Rs. 10 each

events.particulars: Increase in Authorised Share Capital from Rs. 3,00,000 to Rs. 10,00,000 by creation of additional 20,000 Equity Shares and introduction of 50,000 Preference Shares of Rs. 10 each.

capital_before.description: Rs. 10,00,000 divided into 50,000 Equity Shares of Rs. 10 each and 50,000 Preference Shares of Rs. 10 each

capital_after.description: Rs. 50,00,000 divided into 4,50,000 Equity Shares of Rs. 10 each and 50,000 Preference Shares of Rs. 10 each

events.particulars: Increase in Authorised Equity Share Capital from Rs. 5,00,000 to Rs. 45,00,000 by creation of additional 4,00,000 Equity Shares of Rs. 10 each. Preference Share Capital remains unchanged at Rs. 5,00,000.

capital_before.description: Rs. 50,00,000 divided into 4,50,000 Equity Shares of Rs. 10 each and 50,000 Preference Shares of Rs. 10 each

capital_after.description: Rs. 50,00,000 divided into 22,50,000 Equity Shares of Rs. 2 each and 50,000 Preference Shares of Rs. 10 each

events.particulars: Sub-division of Equity Shares from face value of Rs. 10 each to Rs. 2 each. Each Equity Share of Rs. 10 sub-divided into 5 Equity Shares of Rs. 2 each. Total Authorised Share Capital remains unchanged at Rs. 50,00,000.

expected_table.from: Rs. 10,00,000 divided into 50,000 Equity Shares of Rs. 10 each and 50,000 Preference Shares of Rs. 10 each
expected_table.to: Rs. 50,00,000 divided into 4,50,000 Equity Shares of Rs. 10 each and 50,000 Preference Shares of Rs. 10 each

expected_table.from: Rs. 50,00,000 divided into 4,50,000 Equity Shares of Rs. 10 each and 50,000 Preference Shares of Rs. 10 each
expected_table.to: Rs. 50,00,000 divided into 22,50,000 Equity Shares of Rs. 2 each and 50,000 Preference Shares of Rs. 10 each

flags.reason: Board resolution dated 2021-08-05 but SH-7 references EGM date as 2021-08-15. Board resolution precedes EGM as expected.
PAS-3 (Return of Allotment) found in attachments. PAS-3 relates to issued/allotted capital, not authorised capital. Excluded from extraction.

Sub-division event: total authorised capital unchanged at Rs. 50,00,000 but share count and face value changed. Verified: 22,50,000 x Rs. 2 = Rs. 45,00,000 (equity) + 50,000 x Rs. 10 = Rs. 5,00,000 (preference) = Rs. 50,00,000.
